message:
Regenerate conformance artifacts for expanded ufunc and RNG coverage

Update all evidence packs, parity reports, and RaptorQ sidecars to
reflect the expanded operation coverage from the ufunc engine expansion:

Benchmark baselines:
- Refresh ufunc_benchmark_baseline.json with new workload entries for
  all 30 new operations at commit f880590

Phase 2C evidence packs (FNP-P2C-002 through FNP-P2C-009):
- Regenerate final_evidence_pack.json, packet_readiness_report.json,
  parity_report.json, decode_proof.json, raptorq.json, and
  scrub_report.json with updated hashes and expanded test case counts

RNG scenario expansion (FNP-P2C-007):
- Add workflow_scenario_packet007_e2e.jsonl and _e2e_rng.jsonl with
  SeedSequence and BitGenerator end-to-end scenarios
- Add optimized variant scenario files
- Update artifact index and reliability JSONs

RaptorQ bundles:
- Regenerate benchmark_bundle_v1.sidecar.json (+172 lines)
- Regenerate conformance_bundle_v1.sidecar.json (+5,273 lines) with
  expanded block counts

Conformance fixtures:
- Expand ufunc_input_cases.json and ufunc_adversarial_cases.json with
  cases for all 30 new operations
- Expand rng_adversarial_cases.json with SeedSequence/BitGenerator
  edge cases including io_adversarial_cases.json and
  dtype_promotion_cases.json
- Update ufunc_oracle_output.json with reference outputs for new ops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
